item.title: Claude for Chrome Lewis County Built-in M Index Marwee Sawig Check
item.description: Claude for Chrome Lewis County Built-in M Index Marwee Sawig Check This note captures the May 1, 2026 Claude for Chrome microtask focused on the last surviving built-in M-index target in Lewis County Deed Book C-D, DGS 8219256.
